debug_info.goal:
𝕜 M : Type u
inst✝³ : Field 𝕜
inst✝² : AddCancelCommMonoid M
inst✝¹ : AddMonoid.FG M
inst✝ : IsAddTorsionFree M
⊢ IsOpenImmersion sorry

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := AddMonoid.FG.fg_top (N := M)
    let x : AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 M := ∏ z ∈ s, single z 1
    have : IsLocalization.Away x (AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 (GrothendieckAddGroup M)) := by
      apply IsLocalization.away_of_isLocalization (S := (AddSubmonoid.closure (Set.range (single · 1 : M → AddMonoidAlgebra 𝕜 M))).toSubmonoid)
        (AddMonoidAlgebra.isLocalization_grothendieckAddGroup 𝕜 M)
      intro z hz
      induction z using AddSubmonoid.closure_induction with
      | mem z hz =>
        obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ := Set.mem_range.1 hz
        rw [← hs] at m
        refine AddSubmonoid.closure_induction m ?_ (by use 0; simp) ?_
        · intro a ha
          use ∏ b ∈ s.erase a, single b 1
          simp only [x, single_mul_single, ← Finset.prod_insert_eq_multiset_prod _ _ _ ha]
          congr 1; rw [add_comm, Finset.sum_insert ha]
        · rintro a b ⟨na, ha⟩ ⟨nb, hb⟩; use na + nb; rw [pow_add]; apply mul_dvd_mul ha hb
      | one => use 0; simp
      | mul a b ha hb => obtain ⟨na, ha⟩ := ha; obtain ⟨nb, hb⟩ := hb; use na + nb; rw [pow_add]; apply mul_dvd_mul ha hb
    exact .of_isLocalization x (AddMonoidAlgebra.toGrothendieckAddGroupAlgHom 𝕜 M)
